# Moodflix - Full Documentation

> AI-powered movie watchlist and mood-based discovery platform.

## Overview

Moodflix is a movie discovery SaaS that combines a personal watchlist with AI-powered mood-based recommendations. Users describe how they feel, and the app suggests movies that match their mood using Google Gemini AI. It also provides standard movie browsing via TMDB integration.

## Features

### AI Mood Recommendations
- Natural language mood input (e.g., "I feel adventurous and want something mind-bending")
- Streaming AI responses powered by Google Gemini via Vercel AI SDK
- Genre-based movie suggestions extracted from AI analysis
- Rate-limited to 10 requests/day per user

### Movie Discovery
- Trending, popular, and top-rated movie categories
- Genre-based filtering with toggle groups
- Real-time search with debounced input
- Infinite scroll pagination
- Netflix-style movie detail modals with backdrop, cast, and watch providers

### Watchlist Management
- Add/remove movies to personal watchlist
- Status tracking: Want to Watch, Watching, Watched
- Like/dislike rating system
- Optimistic UI updates via TanStack Query

### Authentication
- Email/password signup and login
- Google OAuth
- Passkey support
- Protected routes with middleware-based session refresh

## Tech Stack

| Layer         | Technology                                    |
|---------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| Framework     | Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript |
| Styling       | Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui                    |
| Database      | Supabase (PostgreSQL) with Row Level Security |
| ORM           | Drizzle ORM with postgres-js driver           |
| Auth          | Supabase Auth                                 |
| AI            | Google Gemini via Vercel AI SDK                |
| Data Fetching | TanStack Query (client), Next.js fetch (SSR)  |
| Movie Data    | TMDB API                                      |

## API Routes

- `GET /api/movies` - Search movies, fetch by category, or discover by genre
- `GET /api/movies/[id]` - Movie details with cast, crew, and regional watch providers
- `POST /api/ai/recommend` - AI mood-based recommendation endpoint (authenticated, rate-limited, streaming)

## Database Schema

- `profiles` - User profiles extending Supabase auth.users
- `watchlist` - Movie watchlist with status (want_to_watch/watching/watched) and rating (1/-1/null)
- `ai_recommendations` - AI recommendation history with prompt and JSONB results
